## Checklist

- [ ] Prompt file is in the correct category folder
- [ ] File is named in `kebab-case.md`
- [ ] All 6 sections present: `[ROLE]`, `[CONTEXT]`, `[TASK]`, `[FORMAT]`, `[CONSTRAINTS]`, `[EXAMPLE]`
- [ ] YAML frontmatter includes `name`, `description`, and `category`
- [ ] Category `README.md` table updated
- [ ] `SEARCH.md` updated with at least 2 entries
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or harmful content included
- [ ] Prompt tested in at least one AI assistant

---
